message:
test(frankensqlite): add performance soak and flake validation harness (30 tests)

Covers append/flush/cursor SLO gates (p50/p99), sustained ingest soak
with drift detection, flake variance checks, checkpoint/health/lag
latency, multi-pane contention, and idempotent replay performance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
